title: WedDecor Pack of 12 Square Shimmer Sequin Wall Panel Backdrop, Golden Wall Backdrop Panel for Party Decorations, Birthday, Selfie booth, Events, Weddings, Luxury Home Decor, 30x30cm
features: [SEQUIN PANEL SIZE]: This square-shaped sequin panel measures 12"x12" (30cm x 30cm)
[EASY TO ASSEMBLE]: Easy to assemble and break down. Easy to carry and fix together and can be used multiple times for other occasions for outdoor and indoor use

[DAZZLING APPEARANCE]: Stunning shimmer sequin wall panels feature shiny squares which constanly flutter with the lightest of wind movement making a dazzling appearance, The panels are designed to withstand wind & other weather conditions

[WIDE APPLICATIONS]: These shimmer sequin wall panels are used in various occasions, wedding party, birthday party, anniversary, house warming, shops banner, events decorations, perfect backdrop to take pictures for any party and special events

[ADDS DIMENSION TO ANY WALL]: It is perfect for turning any dull wall or surface into a dreamy sparkling set up as per your requirement. If you can envision it, you can do it with our versatile shimmer panels
description: Product Description What is a sequin wall panel backdrop used for? A sequin wall panel backdrop is used to create a sparkling photo background or feature wall at events like weddings, birthdays, baby showers, and brand activations, it adds instant glamour and draws attention. How do I install a shimmer wall panel? Each panel typically comes pre-assembled with a transparent grid backing, holes, and snap connectors. You just align and click them together or mount them using hooks, screws, or zip ties on a backdrop stand or wall surface. Are sequin wall panels reusable? Yes, they’re fully reusable. Made from durable polymeric materials, shimmer wall panels maintain their shine and can be easily disassembled, stored, and reused for future parties or permanent wall displays. Do the sequins fall off or lose shine over time? High-quality sequin wall panels are designed to hold their sequins securely and won’t shed or fade easily. With gentle handling and indoor use, the sparkle and structure remain intact for multiple uses. Can I use the sequin backdrop outdoors? These panels can be used outdoors for short-term events, but they should be kept sheltered from direct rain or strong wind to preserve the shine and prevent damage to the mounting hardware.
